author: developeruche
content:

I am interested, could help out hook up the Ethrex-PoC. thanks for looping me in 🙏

author: jsign
content:
Ah I don't have anything yet about this -- was mostly talking with people to connect the dots and figure out the plan. 
GIven my talks with you and Spencer, i think next steps is mostly figuring out how to plug things.

I'm imagining:
- Take https://github.com/ethereum/hive to look how `consume engine` is used (or how it works in general)
- Look at https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/pull/2724 which adds support for the new engineapi
- Use it in `hive` to run against your Ethrex branch .. this prob means building a custom docker image of your branch or similar

These are mostly intuitive lines that i was thinking -- no work done yet. If you're interested in start exploring feel free! (I won't have time for some days since i'm finishing other stuff)
